nasb.text: As he said this, there occurred a dissension between the Pharisees and Sadducees, and the assembly was divided.

esv.text: And when he had said this, a dissension arose between the Pharisees and the Sadducees, and the assembly was divided.

cnv.text: 他說了這話，法利賽人和撒都該人就起了爭論，會眾也分裂了，成為兩派。

ccb.text: 这句话立刻引起法利赛人和撒都该人之间的争论，公会分成了两派。

csbs.text: 他说了这话，法利赛人和撒都该人就起了争执，会众也分裂了。
